item.summary: Cyber vulnerability of BLE communication was found by CISA VDP program. Product details: WHILL Model C2, with software versions before HMI: 2.22 / MC: 1.13; device is an indoor/outdoor battery-operated 2-wheel drive (rear-wheel drive) powered wheelchair.
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
